# Sub PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 179.810 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 6.6667
  biquad b0=1.00030613559 b1=-1.99837744782 b2=0.9982097057 a1=-1.99837744782 a2=0.998515841294
Filter 2: ON PK Fc 106.567 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 2.8605
  biquad b0=1.00042273745 b1=-1.99790195235 b2=0.997527812967 a1=-1.99790195235 a2=0.997950550416
Filter 3: ON PK Fc 15.015 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 6.6667
  biquad b0=1.00002558115 b1=-1.9998750158 b2=0.999850400292 a1=-1.9998750158 a2=0.999875981447

  biquad b0=1.00027507484 b1=-1.9986574548 b2=0.998391350333 a1=-1.9986574548 a2=0.998666425175

  biquad b0=0.9997468688 b1=-1.998869012 b2=0.999136295788 a1=-1.998869012 a2=0.998883164588

  biquad b0=1.00007634666 b1=-1.99940546 b2=0.999330726598 a1=-1.99940546 a2=0.999407073257
